title: Removal census + acceptance evidence: repo-wide auto-review wording sweep, census tests, A1-A12 evidence map + UAT scenarios
action: Close SPEC §13 with a removal census and an acceptance-evidence map (per 565e68d0; critical pattern 20260711 'a removal is verified by its invariants'). (1) CENSUS: from the repo root, grep for auto-review chain wording — 'Invoke bee-reviewing' as a completion/next signal, 'final swarm slice' as a review trigger, 'reviewing' as a mandatory post-execution stage — including bare-token variants; census SCOPE = prose surfaces only: skills/**/SKILL.md + skills/**/references/*.md, AGENTS.md + templates/AGENTS.block.md, and living docs/*.md + docs/specs/*.md; EXCLUDE docs/history/ and docs/decisions/ (archaeology, EXCEPT this feature's own plan/reports which may be cited), .bee/ runtime, .git, and TEST FIXTURES — test_lib.mjs legitimately contains 'Invoke bee-reviewing' as fixture strings proving the recommended_next negation (~lines 4577/4584); those stay. KNOWN carriers from the live grep: docs/04-skills-spec.md:72 carries the EXACT retired phrase ('Use when the final swarm slice completes...') — fix it; docs/05-roadmap.md:20,46 ('-> light review', 'after reviewing' chain wording) — fix; docs/02-architecture.md state-model chain, docs/07-contracts.md chain contracts, README.md workflow description — sweep and fix strays; docs/11-implement-plan-adoption.md:115 (walkthrough 'invoked by bee-reviewing after Gate 4 on standard/high-risk features') — reword to session context. KNOWN LEGITIMATE mentions that must NOT be reworded: swarming-reference.md:37 (review-slot description), routing row 'Review request -> bee-reviewing' (it IS the user invocation), bee_status.mjs negation wording, docs/specs/workflow-state.md phase-vocabulary listing 'reviewing' (phase enum stays per SPEC §11.4). Do NOT touch skills outside the listed set. (2) CENSUS TESTS in test_lib.mjs: add checks pinning the new contract — the retired auto-trigger phrases are absent from the live skill/AGENTS surfaces (build every banned-phrase pattern by string concatenation, e.g. 'Invoke bee-' + 'reviewing', so the test file never matches its own patterns — critical patterns 20260708/20260712), and the required new anchors are present (AGENTS.block.md carries the on-request side entry; compounding carries the candidate-add step). (3) EVIDENCE MAP: write docs/history/review-on-demand/reports/uat-scenarios.md — a table mapping every SPEC acceptance scenario A1-A12 to its evidence: automated test name(s) in test_lib.mjs where mechanical (A6 exclusion, A7 covered-answer, A8 stale flip, A10 preflight — shipped in slice 1; census checks from this cell), or a recorded step-by-step UAT script for agent-behavior scenarios (A1/A2/A3 zero-dispatch at close, A4/A5 single/batch session flow, A9 merge guard, A11 P1 blocks session, A12 delta re-review) — each script: setup state, the user utterance, the expected observable bee behavior, and the §9 line expected. SPEC §13 allows a recorded scenario where automation cannot reach the behavior. Do not fabricate test evidence — name only tests that exist and pass.

truths: a repo-root grep (excluding docs/history archaeology, .bee runtime, .git) finds no live-surface wording that routes execution completion into bee-reviewing
census tests are self-match-safe (banned phrases built by concatenation) and green
uat-scenarios.md maps all twelve scenarios A1-A12 to real named tests or recorded UAT scripts — no scenario unaccounted, no invented test names
documentation chain diagrams (docs/02, docs/03, docs/07, README) match the new execution -> scribing -> compounding chain

artifacts.substantive: census checks: banned auto-trigger phrases absent from live surfaces, required anchors present
A1-A12 evidence map: automated test names + recorded UAT scripts with setup/utterance/expected behavior

key_links: critical patterns 20260711 (removal census invariants) and 20260712 (negative greps vs own fixtures) govern the test authoring
SPEC §10 scenario texts are the acceptance source; SPEC §13 defines what counts as evidence
prohibitions: Do not modify docs/history/ archaeology of other features
Do not weaken or delete any existing test assertion
Do not add banned phrases verbatim as string literals that a census grep over the test file would match (concatenate)
Do not name a test in uat-scenarios.md that does not exist in the suite

trace.outcome: Closed SPEC §13 with a removal census + acceptance-evidence map (decision 565e68d0). Census swept the cell's file list (skills/bee-hive, bee-reviewing, bee-swarming, bee-scribing, bee-compounding SKILL.md/references, docs/02,03,04,05,07,11, README.md) for auto-review chain wording left over after cells 4/5/6: fixed the exact retired bee-reviewing description trigger in docs/04-skills-spec.md:72, two stale 'after reviewing'/'light review' Phase 1/3 goal lines in docs/05-roadmap.md, docs/02-architecture.md's scribing-runs-after-reviewing chain description, docs/11-implement-plan-adoption.md's walkthrough trigger wording, and README.md's workflow diagram, Gate table row, 'How review works' intro, lanes table, and session-flow diagram (all previously showed bee-reviewing/Gate 4 as an automatic post-execution stage; now show execution -> scribing -> compounding as the default close with review as a separate boxed on-demand entry). Added two census tests to test_lib.mjs (banned phrases built via string concatenation so the test file can't self-match, per critical pattern 20260712): retired-phrase absence across skills/**/SKILL.md+references, AGENTS.md+AGENTS.block.md, docs/*.md+docs/specs/*.md (docs/history and docs/decisions excluded by construction); and required-anchor presence (AGENTS.block.md on-request side entry, bee-compounding candidate-add step). Wrote docs/history/review-on-demand/reports/uat-scenarios.md mapping all 12 SPEC acceptance scenarios to evidence: A6/A7/A8/A10 to real named test_lib.mjs tests, A1/A2/A3/A4/A5/A9/A11/A12 to recorded UAT scripts (setup/utterance/expected behavior/§9 line) per the cell's own mechanical-vs-UAT split. Verify: test_lib.mjs 208/0 (206 baseline + 2 new), test_onboard_bee.mjs PASS (0 failures, 1 platform skip), uat-scenarios.md exists — composite exit 0. Frozen-judge intact.
trace.verify_output: test_lib.mjs: 208 passed, 0 failed (206 baseline + 2 new census checks). test_onboard_bee.mjs: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1. uat-scenarios.md exists at docs/history/review-on-demand/reports/uat-scenarios.md. Composite command exit 0.
